meaning: n.相对极 (Antipodes)n. 澳大利亚和新西兰
examples: The opposite side of the earth; the antipodes.
The opposite side of the earth; the antipodes .
Two Worlds at the Antipodes, in football and in life.
Wikipedia has a map of world antipodes that you can look at.
To the contrary, the roles are switched, with Apple now cast just as Microsoft was when Jobs and Gates personified the antipodes of the technological universe.
